name: Incline RDL (45° Hyperextension Bench)
description: Performed on the 45-degree hyperextension bench, but executed as a Romanian deadlift — not a back extension. Pad sits just below the hip crease (the hinge fulcrum). Hinge at the hips, keep the lower back NEUTRAL throughout, and feel the stretch in the hamstrings and glutes — not the lumbar. Drive up by squeezing glutes and hamstrings; stop at neutral at the top (no hyperextension). Slow eccentric (3s) with optional pause at the bottom is the core stimulus. Functionally the same machine as the 45-degree back extension, but the form intent is RDL — hip hinge, hamstring stretch, neutral spine.
